figures_detected.description: Camshaft sprocket alignment showing knock pins on both camshafts with timing chain installed
Exploded view of tensioner components: tensioner body, piston, ratchet, spring, plunger
Hands assembling tensioner by rotating and pushing ratchet up the spiral, showing piston and ratchet
Installed tensioner on engine with timing chain visible
Thermostat housing with liquid gasket application bead width indicated as 2.0 - 3.0 mm (0.079 - 0.118 in)

notes: Make sure camshafts are aligned as shown in figure.

steps.text: Assemble the tensioner by rotating and pushing the ratchet up the spiral until it stops. The tensioner is now pre-set. Chain lash will automatically set the tensioner when the engine is started. Install the tensioner.
warnings: Check no problems occur when engine is rotated.
Make sure that No. 1 piston is set at T.D.C. on its compression stroke.

steps.text: Apply liquid gasket to thermostat housing.

content_blocks.text:
CAUTION:
• Check no problems occur when engine is rotated.
• Make sure that No. 1 piston is set at T.D.C. on its compression stroke.

items.label: Liquid gasket bead width for thermostat housing
items.condition: Application to thermostat housing mating surface
